summary: Backend testing for POST /api/sessions and GET /api/stats/subjects endpoints. All 11 tests passed. Seed data verified: Math=210mins, Physics=75mins, History=60mins, Chemistry=45mins, Biology=30mins (420 total mins = 7.0hrs, 6 sessions).

context_for_next_testing_agent: GET /api/stats/subjects returns {subjects: [{subject, total_minutes, total_hours}], total_minutes, total_hours, session_count}. POST /api/sessions requires X-User-ID header and body {subject, duration_minutes}. Both endpoints fully functional.
